title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Mahagun Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Mahagun Group
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
